TRIAL BRIEF

COURT TRIAL ON OCT-30-2006 OFF CALENDAR - JUDGMENT GRANTED IN FAVOR OF PLAINTIFF AND AGAINST DEFENDANT,INTERNATIONAL INDUSTRIES CORPORATION IN THE AMOUNT OF $50,000 PLUS INTEREST FROM JUNE 30, 2003 THRU OCTOBER 30, 2006. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT A DECLARATION AS TO MONTHLY INTEREST WITH PROPOSED JUDGMENT. COSTS ARE AWARDED TO PLAINTIFF IN THE AMOUNT OF $359.50. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF TO SUBMIT JUDGMENT.
DECLARATION RE PREJUDGMENT INTEREST FILED BY PLAINTIFF TSOU, IRENE

calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR COURT
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Assigned To Trial Court

COURT TRIAL
Off Calendar Oct-30-2006 Judgment Entered
MINI MINUTES: The matter comes on calendar this date, having been assigned by Department 206 for Uncontested Trial.

Judge David L. Ballati, Clerk Nancy Regas, Court Reporter Susan Lee, CSR #4280, Dept. 604.
Plaintiff and her counsel, William Van Way are present. Defendant International Industries Corporation is not present.
Plaintiff Irene Tsou is affirmed and examined.
The following exhibits are marked for identification and admitted into evidence:
Plaintiff's Exhibit #1 - High Yield Offer Agreement
Plaintiff's Exhibit #2 - Promissory Note - Demand
Plaintiff's Exhibit #3 - E-mail from Dave to Irene dated 5/6/2003
Plaintiff's Exhibit #4 - E-mail from Dave to Irene dated 5/7/2003
Plaintiff's Exhibit #5 - E-mail from Henry to Irene dated 5/9/2003
Plaintiff's Exhibit #6 - E-mail from Henry to Irene dated 16 Jun 2003
Plaintiff's Exhibit #7 - Email from Henry to Irene dated 6/23/2003
The matter is argued and submitted.
The Court orders Judgment in favor of the Plaintiff and against Defendant International Industries Corporation in the amount of $50,000, plus interest from June 30, 2003 thru October 30, 2006. Counsel for Plaintiff to submit a declaration as to the monthly interest with the proposed judgment. The Court awards costs in the amount of $359.50. The Court does not enter judgment against Henry Wong individually due to lack of evidence.
All exhibits are returned.
Counsel for Plaintiff to submit proposed judgment and declaration of monthly interest to the Court for approval and signature.
